productOptionsHtml:
Use this section for ordering rules: style number, price band, minimums, and stated production time from the supplier catalog. Final invoice may reflect decoration, proofs, rush, or freight.

Catalog highlights

  • Made from 100% lightweight cotton sheeting for eco-friendly durability
  • Free 24 Hour Service
  • Free Paper Proof
  • Features sturdy self-fabric handles for easy and comfortable carrying
  • Folds flat for convenient storage and portability

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

Standard Imprint Colors ▼

Please pick the color you want imprinted. Please note that <strong><font-color="#01994e">only a one color imprint is available for most bags.</strong></font> <ul><strong>Important Notes About Selecting an Imprint Color:</Strong> <li>Light ink colors on dark items will darken the ink color by a few shades</li> <li>Dark ink on a colored item may cause the ink the become darker</li> <li>Choose a color that will have high contrast with the item color</li> <li>PMS Colors will only be accurate when printing on a White item</li> <li>Metallic inks will print true to color on all items</li> <li>Dark imprint colors yield the best results on frosted items</li> <li>Neon colors are very difficult to match, even on White items</li> <li>We use the PMS Coated and PMS Uncoated books. <strong>Do not choose a color from the pastel, neon or other PMS books.</strong></li> </ul>

PMS Match

PMS Color Match

PMS imprint colors other than standard imprint colors listed can be matched for an additional charge per color as below. PMS matches can only be guaranteed on White products. Imprint colors on non-white products will not be exact due to the nature of the process.

$25.00 each

2nd Side Imprint option ▼

Add per piece for a 2nd side imprint. Wrap imprint not available on this product. Additional Set-up Charge required unless the artwork is exactly the same as side one.

Bag 2nd Side Imprint

Additional Charges ▼

The below charges represent a GENERAL list and some charges may vary or not even be an option on certain products. Contact factory to be sure.

Additional Charges

Converting Artwork to Vector Format

<ul><li>Art submitted in non-vector format will incur an art charge to convert to vector format.</li> <li>Please add 24 hours to order's production time to allow for art conversion.</li></ul>

$50.00 each

Additional Charges

Less Than Catalog Minimum

<ul><li>A charge to any order for less than the catalog minimum</li> <li>Less than minimum orders are only available on items that are available 24 Hour Service. Items that are not applicable for 24-hour service have a firm catalog minimum.</li></ul>

$50.00 each

Additional Charges

Mixing Imprint Colors

<ul><li>Mixing imprint ink colors on the same item within an order will incur a charge for each imprint color change.</li></ul>

$25.00 each

Additional Charges

Mixing Product Colors

<ul><li>Splitting an order across two product colors is free of charge.</li> <li>Every additional item color past two, will incur a charge</li></ul>

$5.00 each

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Cotton Economical Tote. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style CBET on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 3 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 50 units (per catalog line).
